name: COPART INC
summary: Copart, Inc. is a leading global provider of online auctions and vehicle remarketing services, operating in the U.S., U.K., Germany, Brazil, Canada, U.A.E., Spain, Finland, Oman, Republic of Ireland, and Bahrain. The company processes and sells vehicles—primarily damaged or total-loss vehicles from insurance companies—through its VB3 internet auction platform to dismantlers, rebuilders, dealers, exporters, and the general public. For fiscal 2025, revenues were $4.6 billion and operating income was $1.7 billion.

products.name: VB3 (Virtual Bidding Third Generation)
products.description: Internet auction-style sales technology with two-step bidding process for vehicle remarketing.

products.name: BID4U
products.description: Automated incremental bidding feature within VB3 that bids on behalf of members up to their maximum price.

products.name: DRIVE Auto Auctions
products.description: Vehicle auction service operated under the DRIVE Auto Auctions brand.

products.name: Purple Wave Auction
products.description: Online auction platform operated as part of Copart's portfolio.

products.name: CrashedToys.com
products.description: Online remarketing platform for recreational and specialty vehicles.

products.name: Green Parts Specialist (GPS)
products.description: U.K.-based operation selling dismantled vehicle parts on a principal basis.

products.name: CA$HFORCARS.COM
products.description: Vehicle buying service for consumers looking to sell their cars.
